$schema_intent: non-normative; manifest of physical SKOS/JSON-LD bundles shipped under RFC-009 §5.7 + §8.6 + ./README.md §3

bundles.notes: Additive to base_transversal_core; together they resolve every reference in docs/rfcs/chimera/packs/fixtures/x.klickd.student.example.json.

notes: Hashes above are SHA-256 over the literal on-disk bytes of each bundle file (NOT a canonicalised form). Changing whitespace will change the hash; this is intentional — the manifest pins the artefact byte-exactly.
Hashes are stability anchors for the Draft scaffold. They are NOT a release signature, NOT a DOI, NOT an IANA action.
If a bundle file is edited, regenerate this manifest in the same PR; the round-trip test in docs/rfcs/chimera/tests/check_bundles.py asserts manifest hashes match disk content.
